CREATE TABLE hex_data (origin UInt64, distance UInt16);
SELECT h3HexRing(origin, distance) AS hexRing FROM hex_data WHERE distance = 1;
SELECT h3HexRing(index, distance) AS hexRing FROM (SELECT origin AS index, distance FROM hex_data) WHERE distance > 0;
SELECT h3HexRing(590080540275638271, MAX(distance)) AS hexRing FROM hex_data;
SELECT hexRing FROM (SELECT h3HexRing(origin, distance) AS hexRing FROM hex_data) WHERE hexRing IS NOT NULL;
WITH (SELECT h3HexRing(590080540275638271, 1)) AS hexRing1, (SELECT h3HexRing(590080540275638271, 2)) AS hexRing2 SELECT hexRing1, hexRing2;
SELECT h3HexRing(590080540275638271, k) AS hexRing FROM (SELECT 1 AS k UNION ALL SELECT 2);
SELECT h3HexRing(index, toUInt16(1)) AS hexRing FROM (SELECT origin AS index FROM hex_data) WHERE index != 0;
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT h3HexRing(590080540275638271, 1) AS hexRing;
SELECT r.hexRing FROM results r WHERE r.hexRing != 0;
SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT h3HexRing(590080540275638271, 1) AS hexRing UNION ALL SELECT h3HexRing(590080540275638271, 2)) AS combined;
SELECT hexRing FROM (SELECT h3HexRing(index, distance) AS hexRing FROM hex_data) WHERE distance < 2;
SELECT h3HexRing(origin, distance) FROM hex_data WHERE origin IN (SELECT origin FROM hex_data WHERE distance = 1) AND distance = 2;
